name: study-site-builder
description: Turn a folder of course materials into a polished study website — orchestrated pipeline with content ingestion, synthesis, templated site generation, practice exams, and a conversational tutor

study-site start.description: Build a complete study website from course materials

study-site add-exam.description: Add a new practice exam to an existing study site

study-site tutor.description: Start an interactive tutoring session using your study materials
